description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.11.0 Docker image and caches the node_modules directory per branch (key ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}). Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a tests job that runs npm run test. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs npm run build, moves the generated files with mv build/* public/, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
